name: Cameron Latu
headline: Buried fourth tight end with special-teams role only
body:
Latu enters 2026 as the fourth option on Philadelphia's tight end depth chart, which tells you everything about his fantasy floor: there isn't one. His value lives almost entirely on special teams, not in the passing game, and expert rankers reflect that with a TE158 consensus tag and rostership hovering near zero percent. With no 2026 projections on the board and a season stat line still reading zeros across the board, there is simply no production case to make here.

A stinger has already kept him out of recent practice work, adding another hurdle for a player who needs injuries ahead of him just to sniff snaps. The lone bright spot is a soft tight end schedule that grades among the easiest in the league, but matchups mean nothing without a role. Leave him on the wire until meaningful targets materialize, which may never come.
